user.title: Connect to PV24
user.description: Enter your Estfeed API credentials and building details for gas consumption tracking.

data_description.client_id: From Estfeed portal → Account & Settings → API Key
data_description.client_secret: The secret shown when you created the API key
data_description.apartment_area_m2: Your apartment's area in square meters
data_description.building_area_m2: Total area of all apartments in the building

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate PV24
reauth_confirm.description: Your Estfeed credentials are no longer valid. Please enter the new client secret.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your Client ID and Client Secret.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to PV24. Please try again later.

abort.already_configured: This PV24 account is already configured.

data_description.apartment_area_m2: Your apartment's area in square meters
data_description.building_area_m2: Total area of all apartments in the building
